title: artocarpus integrifolius var. hirsutus
intro: Artocarpus integrifolius var. hirsutus, also known as the hairy jackfruit tree, is a variety of the Artocarpus integrifolius species, which is a large tree native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds, infections, and skin conditions due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Artocarpus integrifolius var. hirsutus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions, infusions, and topical applications, which are used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
